result.stderr:
dbdeploy 0.10.1+a1f52973ee
Copyright (C) 2026 Luigi Grilli

  validate           Validates scripts filenames and csv files.

  deploy             Runs a set of deploy scripts to one or more databases

  rollback           Runs a set of rollback scripts to one or more databases

  ci                 Runs a CI test where the migrations are deployed, rolled
                     back and deployed again

  generate           Use OpenAI API to generate SQL rollback scripts

  generate-schema    Generates the full schema DDL.

  help               Display more information on a specific command.

  version            Display version information.

commands.payload:
dbdeploy 0.10.1+a1f52973ee
Copyright (C) 2026 Luigi Grilli

  validate           Validates scripts filenames and csv files.

  deploy             Runs a set of deploy scripts to one or more databases

  rollback           Runs a set of rollback scripts to one or more databases

  ci                 Runs a CI test where the migrations are deployed, rolled
                     back and deployed again

  generate           Use OpenAI API to generate SQL rollback scripts

  generate-schema    Generates the full schema DDL.

  help               Display more information on a specific command.

  version            Display version information.

result.stderr:
dbdeploy 0.10.1+a1f52973ee
Copyright (C) 2026 Luigi Grilli

  -t, --test      (Default: false) Enable deployments of test scripts

  -c, --create    (Default: false) Enable creation of the database if the
                  database does not exists

  -b, --branch    Name of branch to deploy (defaults to 'main' or the default
                  branch name set in the global settings)

  -d, --dryrun    Enable to test what scripts needs to be deployed without
                  actually running them

  -p, --path      Path of directory containing databases scripts (defaults to
                  current directory)

  --help          Display this help screen.

  --version       Display version information.
